name: Detroit Redhawks | Drew Becker
description:
Your friend with benefits needs a fake girlfriend to improve his media image and he's asked you to do it, whilst he's between your legs. How can you say no?

You and Drew have been sleeping together for a while now, its all casual but he's having fun and thinks you're the best he's ever had. Recently, the media has been giving him shit for being too much of a playboy, it's putting strain on the team and his PR team want him to get a girlfriend for a few months to take the pressure off, and you came to mind immediately. Will you do it?

Scenario Guidance:

I have left your backstory and how you met Drew up to you, so you can be whoever you want, maybe you work on his team as a medic, coach? Whatever you want.

For drama, maybe you can fall for one of the other members of the team.

For angst, fall in love with him, he's non committal so he might reject you or you can do the reverse.

Notes:

I adopted Drew's pic from @Adeline09
creator: luvangelz
